user.title: F1 25 Telemetry Configuration
user.description: Set the UDP port to listen to. Use a different port for each console (e.g. 20777 and 20778).

data.forward_enabled: Enable UDP Forwarding (re-transmit raw packets to another device)

error.port_in_use: This port is already used by another F1 25 Telemetry instance. Choose a different port.
